download.ASCII.file downloads grid data.

Source: R/download.ASCII.file.R
download.ASCII.file.Rd

This is an internal function. It downloads an ARCMAP ASCII grid file from a URL.

Usage

download.ASCII.file(
  url.string,
  ivar.url.ext,
  ivar.file.ext,
  ivar.timestep,
  data.type.label,
  workingFolder,
  datestring
)

Value

A list variable of the file name and succes/failure flag.

On this page
